title: More Menu (Part 2/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
| Notice Inviting Tender in sealed cover is hereby invited by the undersigned for the “Electronic good/items” as mentioned in Annexure-I for the Office of the Block Development Officer, Mandwi RD Block. | 28/08/2024 | 02/09/2024 | |
| inviting e- tender for the period of December 2023 to March 2025 of the license of foreign liquor warehouses | | 26/06/2024 | 15/07/2024 | |
| E-tender for settlement of one (1) foreign liquor warehouse “from Shalbagan to Mohanpur, including Mohanpur Municipal Area under West Tripura District along the state highway” for the period of December 2023 to March 2025 | | 06/03/2024 | 28/03/2024 | |
| Notice of Inviting Tender for Supply of Computer, Laptop, UPs, and Accessories | | 15/02/2024 | 26/02/2024 | |
| Quotation Call Notice for Sale of Vehicles | | 05/02/2024 | 16/02/2024 | |
